positive: A symmetrical, central composition of bioluminescent deep-sea flora and crystalline celestial structures. Imagine intricate, glowing coral forming geometric patterns around a stylized nebula burst. Use a deep indigo and turquoise color palette accented with ethereal gold highlights. The style must be highly detailed, graphic illustration with strong, clean silhouettes and luminous gradients. Focus on thick, defined outlines suitable for screen printing, giving it a 'stained glass' yet fluid, organic feel. High contrast lighting emphasizing the glow against a deep, saturated background.
negative: low resolution, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, grainy, messy, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, distorted
